metadata.name: cora_battle
metadata.description: Ephemeral Rollup program for CORA Battle

instructions.name: activate_session
docs: Activate the session after card registration is complete.
Transitions WaitingCards → Active. Authority-only.

instructions.name: apply_card_effect
docs: Apply a backend-authorized final card effect to ER battle state.
The backend remains the source of truth for answer validation and
private multiplier computation; ER only stores the final public effect.

instructions.name: apply_damage
docs: Apply damage to the opponent of the attacker.
Authority-only. Backend verifies the answer off-chain,
then calls this to record damage on-chain.

instructions.name: apply_effect
docs: Apply a committed inline manifest slot to ER battle state.

instructions.name: cancel_session
docs: Cancel an unresolved session with an explicit ER outcome reason.

instructions.name: close_session
docs: Close a terminal session account and reclaim rent SOL.
Authority-only. Only Finished or Cancelled sessions.

instructions.name: commit_battle_session
docs: Schedule a BattleSession state commit from ER back to Solana.

instructions.name: commit_registered_card
docs: Schedule a RegisteredCard state commit from ER back to Solana.

instructions.name: create_session
docs: Create a new battle session for two players.
The signer becomes the session authority (backend oracle).

instructions.name: delegate_battle_session
docs: Delegate the BattleSession PDA from the Solana base layer to MagicBlock ER.

instructions.name: delegate_registered_card
docs: Delegate one RegisteredCard PDA so replay state can be mutated in ER.

instructions.name: finalize_match
docs: Emit the BattleFinalized event for the settlement oracle.
Authority-only. Session must be in Finished status.

instructions.name: force_end
docs: Force-end a timed-out session. Authority-only.
Only callable after SESSION_TIMEOUT has elapsed.

instructions.name: register_card
docs: Register a card (question mapping) for a battle session.
Legacy damage-only path. New effect-aware flows should use register_card_v2.

instructions.name: register_card_v2
docs: Register an effect-aware card for ER resolution.
Authority-only. Only allowed in WaitingCards status.

instructions.name: resolve_round_by_state
docs: Resolve a timer-expired round from current ER state.
Uses only public state: health, round damage, and existing match totals.

instructions.name: set_card_manifest
docs: Commit the immutable inline manifest for one player before activation.

instructions.name: surrender_match
docs: Finish the match immediately when one player surrenders.

instructions.name: timeout_player_for_round
docs: Resolve a single-player round timeout after the round deadline.
Reconnects before this deadline are handled off-chain by the backend.

instructions.name: undelegate_battle_session
docs: Commit and undelegate the BattleSession PDA when the battle has ended.

instructions.name: undelegate_registered_card
docs: Commit and undelegate a RegisteredCard PDA when the battle has ended.

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: Session is not in the expected status

errors.name: UnauthorizedPlayer
errors.msg: Player is not a participant in this session

errors.name: UnregisteredCard
errors.msg: Card does not belong to this session

errors.name: UnauthorizedAuthority
errors.msg: Only the session authority can perform this action

errors.name: AlreadyFinished
errors.msg: Session has already finished

errors.name: SamePlayer
errors.msg: Player A and Player B cannot be the same address

errors.name: CardAlreadyUsed
errors.msg: Card has already been used in this session

errors.name: InvalidDamage
errors.msg: Damage value is out of allowed range

errors.name: InvalidEffectType
errors.msg: Effect type is not valid for this card

errors.name: InvalidEffectValue
errors.msg: Effect value is not valid for this card

errors.name: InvalidScoreDelta
errors.msg: Gameplay score delta is out of allowed range

errors.name: InvalidCardOwner
errors.msg: Registered card owner is not valid for this session

errors.name: InvalidRoundState
errors.msg: Current round state is not valid for this instruction

errors.name: InvalidTarget
errors.msg: Target must be a participant in this session

errors.name: TimeoutNotReached
errors.msg: Session timeout has not been reached yet

errors.name: RoundDeadlinePassed
errors.msg: Round deadline has passed for applying card effects

errors.name: InvalidEndReason
errors.msg: End reason is not valid for this instruction

errors.name: SessionExpired
errors.msg: Session has expired due to timeout

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow in game state calculation

errors.name: ManifestNotCommitted
errors.msg: Card manifest has not been committed yet

errors.name: InvalidManifest
errors.msg: Card manifest data is invalid

errors.name: SlotOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Card slot index is out of bounds

errors.name: ScoreDeltaExceedsMultiplier
errors.msg: Score delta exceeds multiplier-based maximum

errors.name: InvalidSurrenderPlayer
errors.msg: Surrendering player is invalid

fields.name: score_a
docs: Canonical round wins for player A.

fields.name: score_b
docs: Canonical round wins for player B.

fields.name: rounds_won_a
docs: Legacy duplicate of score_a, kept for compatibility.

fields.name: rounds_won_b
docs: Legacy duplicate of score_b, kept for compatibility.

types.name: BattleSession
docs: The main battle session account, tracking all on-chain game state.
Acts as a backend-authorized battle state mirror. Answer verification and
private effect math stay off-chain; ER only records final public effects.

fields.name: version
docs: Schema version for forward-compatible upgrades

fields.name: match_id
docs: Unique match identifier (sha256 of match UUID from backend)

fields.name: authority
docs: The backend oracle authority that controls this session.
Only this signer can register cards, apply damage, and finalize.

fields.name: player_a
docs: Player A's wallet address

fields.name: player_b
docs: Player B's wallet address

fields.name: health_a
docs: Player A's current health points (reset each round)

fields.name: health_b
docs: Player B's current health points (reset each round)

fields.name: score_a
docs: Canonical rounds won by player A for match winner evaluation.

fields.name: score_b
docs: Canonical rounds won by player B for match winner evaluation.

fields.name: current_round
docs: Current round number (1-indexed while active, 0 before activation)

fields.name: rounds_won_a
docs: Legacy duplicate of score_a, kept synchronized for backward compatibility.

fields.name: rounds_won_b
docs: Legacy duplicate of score_b, kept synchronized for backward compatibility.

fields.name: round_started_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the current round started

fields.name: round_deadline
docs: Unix timestamp when the current round may be resolved by timeout

fields.name: player_a_missed_rounds
docs: Rounds missed by player A due to timeout

fields.name: player_b_missed_rounds
docs: Rounds missed by player B due to timeout

fields.name: total_plays
docs: Total resolved card plays applied to ER state (audit trail)

fields.name: status
docs: Current battle status (state machine)

fields.name: winner
docs: Winner's pubkey (Pubkey::default() until Finished)

fields.name: question_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of the public question set commitment, not an answer hash.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when session was created

fields.name: finished_at
docs: Unix timestamp when session finished (0 if not finished)

fields.name: end_reason
docs: Terminal outcome reason. See END_REASON_* constants.

fields.name: game_score_a
docs: Cumulative gameplay score for player A, used for final tie-breaks.

fields.name: game_score_b
docs: Cumulative gameplay score for player B, used for final tie-breaks.

fields.name: round_damage_a
docs: Attack damage contributed by player A during the current round.

fields.name: round_damage_b
docs: Attack damage contributed by player B during the current round.

fields.name: total_slots_a
docs: Total inline manifest slots committed for player A.

fields.name: total_slots_b
docs: Total inline manifest slots committed for player B.

fields.name: cards_used_a
docs: Replay bitmask for player A card slots.

fields.name: cards_used_b
docs: Replay bitmask for player B card slots.

fields.name: manifest_committed_a
docs: Whether player A's manifest has been committed.

fields.name: manifest_committed_b
docs: Whether player B's manifest has been committed.

fields.name: card_manifest_a
docs: Packed inline manifest for player A.

fields.name: card_manifest_b
docs: Packed inline manifest for player B.

types.name: BattleStatus
docs: State machine for battle lifecycle.
Transitions: WaitingCards → Active → Finished
→ Cancelled (via force_end)
WaitingCards → Cancelled (via force_end)

types.name: RegisteredCard
docs: A registered card representing one question's public ER effect envelope.
The card_id uses dummy ephemeral IDs to prevent correlation with
real question IDs in the database (privacy via Ephemeral Mapping).

fields.name: session
docs: Reference to parent BattleSession PDA

fields.name: card_id
docs: Dummy card identifier for ephemeral mapping

fields.name: owner
docs: Player who is allowed to resolve this card in ER.

fields.name: effect_type
docs: Public effect kind used for auditable ER state changes.

fields.name: max_value
docs: Maximum final effect value the backend may authorize for this card.

fields.name: damage
docs: Legacy damage-only attack value used by apply_damage compatibility flow.

fields.name: is_used
docs: Replay protection — card can only be used once

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: score_a
docs: Canonical round wins for player A.

fields.name: score_b
docs: Canonical round wins for player B.
